---
title: "Visit Japan Web - Pre-Flight Checklist"
subtitle: "Tokyo Flight from Incheon - October 31, 2025"
author: "DJG"
date: "2025-10-23"
image: dad_japan.jpg
categories: [japan]
lightbox: true
format:
  html:
    theme: lux
    toc: true
---

## What is Visit Japan Web?

Visit Japan Web is an official digital platform provided by the Japanese government that lets tourists pre-register arrival procedures—including immigration, customs, and tax-free declarations—online before arriving in Japan.

## Is it Required?

Visit Japan Web has never been "required" for immigration and customs, though it has always been strongly recommended. However, many airlines have stopped handing out arrival cards and customs declarations before you land, making online registration the most convenient option.

**Bottom line:** Not mandatory, but highly recommended to speed up your arrival process significantly.

## What You'll Need

Before starting, gather these documents:

-   Valid passport
-   Flight details (airline, flight number, departure city)
-   Accommodation information in Japan (hotel name, address, phone number)
-   Email address (for account creation)

**Note:** As of April 29, 2023, Japan has lifted all COVID-19 border measures. No vaccination certificate, negative test result, or quarantine is required.

## Registration Timeline

**Recommended:** Complete your registration at home, about two weeks before your departure (around **October 17, 2025**).

**Time required:** About 15 minutes

## Step-by-Step Process

### Step 1: Create Account

-   Go to https://services.digital.go.jp/en/visit-japan-web/
-   Register with email address and password
-   Verify your email

### Step 2: Enter Your Details

-   Click "Your Details" on home screen
-   Enter passport information (name, number, nationality, date of birth, gender)
-   Add family members if traveling together (up to 10 people on same itinerary)

### Step 3: Register Your Trip

-   Click "Register new planned entry/return"
-   Enter trip details:
    -   **Trip name:** "October 31 Tokyo"
    -   **Arrival date:** October 31, 2025
    -   **Airline:** Your airline name/code
    -   **Flight number:** Enter numbers only (if flight is NH0123, enter "0123")
    -   **Departure city:** Incheon
    -   Accommodation details in Tokyo

### Step 4: Complete Immigration & Customs Forms

Visit Japan Web consists of three parts: immigration information (disembarkation card), customs information (customs declaration), and tax-exemption section.

Fill out: - Immigration/disembarkation card - Customs declaration

### Step 5: Generate QR Codes

-   Review all information carefully
-   Click "Display QR Code"
-   Click "Agree and display the QR Code"
-   **Important:** A screenshot or printed version of the QR code is not accepted. You'll need a phone with internet access (via airport Wi-Fi) or have the offline Visit Japan Web app installed.

## At the Airport (October 31)

**What to bring:** - Your phone with Visit Japan Web QR codes displayed - Ensure you have internet access (airport WiFi) or download the offline app

**At Tokyo Airport:** 1. Show QR code at immigration desk 2. Provide fingerprints and facial photo (standard for all visitors) 3. Show QR code at customs 4. Using Visit Japan Web affords you access to a dedicated customs queue, which you can often clear in just seconds

## Important Reminders

-   Complete registration **before October 31**
-   Ensure your phone is charged
-   Have airport WiFi access or offline app ready
-   Once you click to display the QR code, you can no longer modify trip information
-   Double-check all information before generating QR codes

## Benefits of Using Visit Japan Web

-   Skip filling out paper forms
-   Faster immigration and customs processing
-   Dedicated express lanes at the airport
-   All information submitted in advance

**Registration Link:** https://services.digital.go.jp/en/visit-japan-web/
